openFindings.title: Parent spec.md Status: Planned contradicts 5 children Status: Complete

claimAdjudication.downgradeTrigger: If parent spec.md is regenerated to Status: Complete and retrospective is updated, downgrade to P2.

openFindings.title: Parent Files to Change and Phase Map declare 4 lanes but 5 children exist (intentionally isolated 005 lane)

transitions.reason: Severity confirmed; rationale refined: 005 is intentionally outside the 4-lane scope per spec.md Phase | 5 + impl-summary scope-lock note, but the parent spec.md still does not declare 005 anywhere.

claimAdjudication.downgradeTrigger: If parent spec.md is updated to declare the isolated 005 lane and the Files to Change table is widened, downgrade to P2.

openFindings.title: Parent Open Questions 'specced but not yet built' is stale

claimAdjudication.downgradeTrigger: If the open question is updated to reflect implementation-record state, downgrade to P2.

openFindings.title: Program retrospective.md lists 4 hallmark lanes as Planned contradicting per-packet Complete

claimAdjudication.downgradeTrigger: If the retrospective is updated to mark the four hallmark adoption lanes as Complete, downgrade to P2.

openFindings.title: 006-deep-alignment-and-review/alignment is a seeded but unrun deep-alignment run; not in parent children_ids

claimAdjudication.downgradeTrigger: If the 006 directory is cleaned up or formally added to the parent, resolve.

openFindings.title: 005 impl-summary Known Limitations says 'Generated metadata pending' but description.json and graph-metadata.json are present

transitions.reason: Extended to cover the verification-table row as a separate documentation-drift surface; F006 (impl-summary self-contradiction) and F010 (verification-table contradiction) are now the same root cause with two distinct surfaces

claimAdjudication.downgradeTrigger: If the 005 impl-summary's Known Limitations section and verification table row are both updated, resolve F006+F010.

openFindings.title: 002-evidence-envelopes spec.md Open Questions section lists pre-edit line numbers (146/490/260) but post-edit positions are 207/286

claimAdjudication.downgradeTrigger: If the 002 spec.md §7 is renamed to 'Verification Audit' or the historical content is moved to the implementation summary handoff, resolve.

openFindings.title: Regenerate scripts do not propagate child status to parent; F001 will not be caught by the documented workflow

claimAdjudication.downgradeTrigger: If a parent-child reconciliation script is added to the regenerate workflow or a new validator is introduced that captures parent-child status consistency, resolve.

openFindings.title: 005 impl-summary Known Limitations 'Generated metadata pending' is stale

claimAdjudication.downgradeTrigger: If the 005 impl-summary's Known Limitations section is updated to remove the 'Generated metadata pending' line, resolve.

openFindings.title: 005 impl-summary verification table row 'graph metadata absent' is the same contradiction as F006

claimAdjudication.downgradeTrigger: If the 005 impl-summary's verification table row is updated to remove the 'graph metadata absent' clause, resolve.
